name: Your Best Credit Union
description_short: Your Best Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative chartered in 1967 offering auto loans, mortgages, credit cards, and savings products to eligible members nationwide.
description_long:
Your Best Credit Union was established in 1967 and operates as a traditional credit union serving members across the United States. The organization emphasizes its cooperative structure with the philosophy of 'people helping people,' positioning itself as a member-focused alternative to traditional banks. Membership is available to employees of affiliated companies and their family members, with automatic eligibility extended to spouses, children, parents, grandparents, siblings, and extended family.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans (as low as 5.00% APR with current promotions at 4.85%), mortgages for purchase and refinancing, signature loans (11.90% APR), and credit cards (9.90% APR). On the savings side, they provide regular share accounts (0.10% APY), Money Market accounts (3.557% APY), and Share Certificates (3.803% APY). Digital services include online bill pay, eStatements, remote deposit through their mobile app, and account management features accessible from smartphones.

Your Best Credit Union distinguishes itself through family membership expansion—once an individual joins, their entire extended family becomes automatically eligible for membership without separate qualification. The organization also offers promotional incentives such as 90 days of no payments on auto loans and competitive auto refinance options promising rates 2% lower than current financing or their best qualified rate. Their long operational history since 1967 combined with nationwide service availability sets them apart from smaller, locally-focused credit unions.

The primary caveat is that membership eligibility depends on employer affiliation or family connection to an existing member, limiting accessibility compared to banks open to the general public. While rates are competitive, they are not transparently listed as the absolute lowest available. The website lacks detailed information about membership fees, minimum deposits, account minimums, or specific underwriting criteria, which consumers would need before applying.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Auto loan promotional rate of 4.85% APR with 90 days no payments on new and used vehicles
Family membership expansion—spouse, children, parents, and extended relatives automatically eligible once one member joins
Chartered since 1967 with established operational history and nationwide service availability
Competitive savings rates with Money Market accounts up to 3.557% APY and CDs up to 3.803% APY
Mobile app with remote deposit capability allowing check deposits from smartphone
Auto refinance option offering 2% less than current rate or best qualified rate
Free eStatements and online bill pay for paperless account management
cons: Membership restricted to employees of affiliated companies or family members of existing members—not open to general public
Credit card APR starts at 9.90%, which is higher than many competitive card issuers offering 0% introductory rates
Website lacks transparent fee schedules, minimum deposit requirements, or account minimums for savings products
No information provided about underwriting criteria, credit score requirements, or approval timelines
Limited detail on mortgage products, terms, and competitive positioning compared to dedicated mortgage lenders
best_for: Employees of affiliated companies seeking to consolidate financial services with competitive rates
Multi-generational families wanting automatic membership expansion without individual applications
Auto buyers and refinancers looking for promotional rate incentives and extended payment grace periods
Members prioritizing cooperative financial institutions and relationship-based banking over larger commercial banks
diagnosis: Your Best Credit Union is ideal for employees of affiliated companies and their families seeking comprehensive financial services under one cooperative institution, particularly those interested in auto financing promotions and multi-generational membership benefits. The primary limitation is membership eligibility—applicants must either work for a participating employer or have family connections to existing members, making this unsuitable for consumers without these qualifying criteria.
services: Auto loans for new and used vehicle purchases
Auto loan refinancing with rate reduction options
Mortgage lending for home purchase and refinancing
Credit cards with rewards and access features
Mobile banking app with balance and transaction viewing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
